import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class TextClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size: int, embed_dim: int, num_classes: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, embed_dim)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(embed_dim, num_classes)

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        embedded = self.embedding(x).mean(dim=1)
        return self.fc(embedded)

model = TextClassifier(10000, 128, 5)

def predict(text_ids: torch.Tensor) -> int:
    with torch.no_grad():
        output = model(text_ids.unsqueeze(0))
    return output.argmax(dim=-1).item()

def predict_batch(batch_ids: torch.Tensor) -> list[int]:
    with torch.inference_mode():
        logits = model(batch_ids)
    predictions = logits.argmax(dim=-1)
    return predictions.tolist()

def get_confidence(text_ids: torch.Tensor) -> float:
    with torch.no_grad():
        logits = model(text_ids.unsqueeze(0))
        probs = torch.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
    return probs.max().item()
